nodes.name: 索马里
nodes.summary: 索马里是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联143种鸟类，包括索马里鸵鸟、Eastern crested guinea fowl、Yellow-necked spurfowl等143种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Russet lark
nodes.summary: The russet lark (Corypha sharpii), also known as Sharpe's lark, is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae found in Somalia. Taxonomy The russet lark was formerly placed in the genus Mirafra. It is one of several species that were moved to the resurrected genus Corypha based on the results of a large molecular genetic study by the Swedish ornithologist Per Alström and collaborators that was published in 2023. The species is monotypic: no subspecies are recognised. References
